privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file does not contain a 'metadata' field. The task operates on a synthetic Odoo 17 environment with synthetic contacts (Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, etc.) and synthetic calendar events created by setup_data.py. The Odoo instance runs in Docker with default admin credentials (admin/admin) at http://localhost:8069. All data is generated during environment setup rather than from external or real sources.
